result.stderr:
ODataExampleGen 0.7.1
2021 Microsoft Corporation

  -c, --csdl               Required. CSDL file to use as the model from within
                           which to generate examples.

  -m, --method             Required. Generate output for the given HTTP method.

  -u, --uri                Required. URI to generate an example to POST to/GET
                           from etc.

  -b, --baseUri            (Default: https://graph.microsoft.com/beta/) Base URI
                           for the API.

  -p, --propertyTypes      Property:Type pairs for resolving choices in the
                           inheritance hierarchy. Use propertyName:@skip to
                           remove a property.

  -e, --enumValues         Property:EnumValue pairs for resolving choices in
                           enum property values.

  -r, --primitiveValues    Property:PrimitiveValue pairs for resolving choices
                           in primitive property values.

  -i, --idProviders        Property:IdProvider pairs for resolving which
                           provider used to generate ids in string property
                           values ending with id/Id.  Use @default as the
                           property name for a fallback choice.

  -d, --deepInserts        Navigation property names that should be deep
                           inserted on a PUT/POST/PATCH. Expand on GET should be
                           specified in the uri parameter.

  --help                   Display this help screen.

  --version                Display version information.

ODataExampleGen 0.7.1
2021 Microsoft Corporation

  -c, --csdl               Required. CSDL file to use as the model from within
                           which to generate examples.

  -m, --method             Required. Generate output for the given HTTP method.

  -u, --uri                Required. URI to generate an example to POST to/GET
                           from etc.

  -b, --baseUri            (Default: https://graph.microsoft.com/beta/) Base URI
                           for the API.

  -p, --propertyTypes      Property:Type pairs for resolving choices in the
                           inheritance hierarchy. Use propertyName:@skip to
                           remove a property.

  -e, --enumValues         Property:EnumValue pairs for resolving choices in
                           enum property values.

  -r, --primitiveValues    Property:PrimitiveValue pairs for resolving choices
                           in primitive property values.

  -i, --idProviders        Property:IdProvider pairs for resolving which
                           provider used to generate ids in string property
                           values ending with id/Id.  Use @default as the
                           property name for a fallback choice.

  -d, --deepInserts        Navigation property names that should be deep
                           inserted on a PUT/POST/PATCH. Expand on GET should be

  --help                   Display this help screen.

  --version                Display version information.

options.description: CSDL file to use as the model from within which to generate examples.
Generate output for the given HTTP method.
URI to generate an example to POST to/GET from etc.
Navigation property names that should be deep inserted on a PUT/POST/PATCH. Expand on GET should be specified in the uri parameter.
Property:EnumValue pairs for resolving choices in enum property values.
Property:IdProvider pairs for resolving which provider used to generate ids in string property values ending with id/Id.  Use @default as the property name for a fallback choice.
Property:PrimitiveValue pairs for resolving choices in primitive property values.
Property:Type pairs for resolving choices in the inheritance hierarchy. Use propertyName:@skip to remove a property.
